# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts
  NODE_VERSION: '18'

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      build-time: ${{ steps.version.outputs.build-time }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Generate version info
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
          BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "build-time=$BUILD_TIME" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "{\"version\":\"$VERSION\",\"buildTime\":\"$BUILD_TIME\",\"commit\":\"$GITHUB_SHA\"}" > dist/version.json

      - name: Create artifact archive
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts
          tar -czf artifacts/app-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}.tar.gz dist/
          cp package.json artifacts/
          cp package-lock.json artifacts/

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: artifacts/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload test results
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: |
            coverage/
            test-results/
          retention-days: 14
          if-no-files-found: warn

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
            config/staging

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Extract artifacts
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          tar -xzf app-${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}.tar.gz
          ls -la

      - name: Setup deployment environment
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/*.sh
          echo "Deploying version ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}"
          echo "Build time: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-time }}"

      - name: Pre-deployment checks
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/pre-deploy-checks.sh staging
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: staging

      - name: Deploy to staging server
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/deploy.sh staging
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: staging
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USER }}
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_KEY }}

      - name: Run smoke tests
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/smoke-tests.sh staging
        env:
          STAGING_URL: https://staging.example.com

      - name: Post-deployment verification
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/verify-deployment.sh staging
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: staging

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, deploy-staging]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://production.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
            config/production

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Extract artifacts
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          tar -xzf app-${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}.tar.gz
          ls -la

      - name: Setup deployment environment
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/*.sh
          echo "Deploying version ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }} to PRODUCTION"
          echo "Build time: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-time }}"

      - name: Pre-deployment checks
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/pre-deploy-checks.sh production
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production

      - name: Create deployment backup
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/backup.sh production
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          BACKUP_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}

      - name: Deploy to production servers
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/deploy.sh production
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USER }}
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY }}

      - name: Run smoke tests
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/smoke-tests.sh production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_URL: https://production.example.com

      - name: Post-deployment verification
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/verify-deployment.sh production
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production

      - name: Notify deployment success
        if: success()
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/notify.sh success
        env:
          WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK }}
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}

      - name: Rollback on failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/rollback.sh production
          bash scripts/deploy/notify.sh failure
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK }}

  deploy-canary:
    name: Canary Deployment
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, deploy-staging]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: canary
      url: https://canary.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Extract artifacts
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          tar -xzf app-${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}.tar.gz

      - name: Deploy canary release
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/*.sh
          bash scripts/deploy/canary-deploy.sh
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: canary
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}
          CANARY_HOST: ${{ secrets.CANARY_HOST }}
          TRAFFIC_PERCENTAGE: 10

      - name: Monitor canary metrics
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/monitor-canary.sh
        env:
          MONITORING_ENDPOINT: ${{ secrets.MONITORING_ENDPOINT }}
          DURATION: 300

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup Old Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [deploy-production]
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Cleanup workflow artifacts
        uses: geekyeggo/delete-artifact@v5
        with:
          name: |
            test-results
          failOnError: false

      - name: Report deployment status
        run: |
          echo "Deployment pipeline completed"
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}"
          echo "Status: ${{ job.status }}"
